name: Haunted House Escape Room
description: An unbreakable haunted mansion enclosing the spawn point, with narrow corridors, low light, dense fog, and a stalking entity.

foyer.description: A flickering lantern-lit foyer with the main door sealed by spectral energy. The walls are unbreakable.

northHall.description: A narrow hallway lined with warped portraits and distant whispers. Walls cannot be broken.

atticStairs.description: Stairs to the attic that creak under unseen weight. The structure is protected.

attic.description: A cramped attic full of broken toys and the first sign of the Staker. All blocks are unbreakable.

cellarEntrance.description: A low stone entry into the cellar. Cold air presses against your skin. The entrance is sealed.

cellar.description: The cellar is pitch dark with strange hums reverberating off the stone. Everything is unbreakable.

entities.description: A stalking entity like The Bath Boy, Playmate, and Sisofrania combined.
